emails.subject: Gas Management Agreement
emails.body: Gas Management Agreement Daren, Will there ever be a need to utilize transport to get supply to the plant other than through the 2 Lone Star agreements? If so, would we be using Tenaska transport agreements or ENA?

emails.subject: Re: Gas Management Agreement
emails.body: Re: Gas Management Agreement Sandi, The exisiting contracts on Lone Star are sufficient to cover deliveries to the plant (95,000 Mmbtu maximum daily quantity). In the event that we have to transport excess gas to alternate locations, we will be using an ENA transport agreement and charging the expense back to Tenaska IV. D From: Sandi M Braband on 10/11/2000 11:16 AM
